basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS)
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) Plastic & Burn Technician Notification 2026 has been released on 22-05-2026 on the official website of Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS). A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the BFUHS Plastic & Burn Technician Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: SC: 5 years; Punjab Govt. employees: up to 45 years; Widow/Divorcee: up to 40 years; Contract employees in BFUHS: equivalent to service period

qualification.education_qualification: 2 years Diploma Course in Plastic Surgery Department in Medical College.
qualification.details: 2 years Diploma Course in Plastic Surgery Department in Medical College.

selection_process: Written Test Merit List (inter-se-merit of written test and marks of experience)
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 11-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
